overview.description: Award-winning creative & tech studio offering brand strategy, AI & digital innovation, web/app development, and content services
overview.description_long: Brainz Disruptive (now operating as Brainz Studios) is a Prague-based creative and technology studio founded in 2007. They connect strategy, design and technology to deliver innovative solutions with real impact. Their services span Brand Strategy, Visual Design, AI & Digital Innovation, Web & App Development, Storytelling & Content, and PR & Reputation.
overview.tagline: Built on experience, disruptive in thinking

history.origin_story: Incorporated on March 13, 2007 in Prague as a creative digital studio

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague as Brainz Disruptive S.R.O.
Rebranded / expanded under Brainz Studios identity at brainzstudios.cz

metadata.notes: Company operates under both 'Brainz Disruptive' (legal name, LinkedIn) and 'Brainz Studios' (current brand, website brainzstudios.cz / disruptive.cz). EMIS reports 1-5 employees as of 2023. Primarily a creative/digital studio; AI & Digital Innovation is one of several service lines, not the core focus. Listed in Prague AI catalog (CNAIP source in index) but is not AI-native.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Consulting/services model is highly vulnerable as AI tools enable clients to do work in-house.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Small team with no visible customer traction or market validation signals.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known funding and very small team. High dependency on bootstrapped revenue or future fundraising.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Multiple high-risk factors across AGI displacement, market, or funding dimensions.
